subtasks.description: Query license database to group licenses by publisher and compute aggregations: total contract value, average cost per seat, and count of licenses per publisher

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL query with GROUP BY and aggregate functions (SUM, AVG, COUNT). No joins to multiple tables are mentioned, no complex window functions, and no cross-source reconciliation needed. This is a straightforward aggregation task suitable for small tier. One subtask is sufficient because all the requested metrics (total contract value, average cost per seat, license count) can be computed in a single GROUP BY query with multiple aggregate columns in one sql_gen call.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) AS avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
